name_en: Lo*we New Model 🆕 Soft smooth cowhide and jacquard military crossbody 👨
name_cn:
Lo*we New Model 🆕 Soft smooth cowhide and jacquard military crossbody 👨
Zipper top compartment and extra front flap compartment*with flap🚹 This version is made of cowhide and jacquard fabric👇*Loewe jacquard shoulder strap👏 Wear over shoulder or crossbody*Adjustable shoulder strap with metal sliders*Magnetic closure*Internal slip pocket*Herringbone cotton canvas lining*Anagram embossed🌟
Size:24.5*18*10.5cm
Model:11388
